widgets.title: Rate Usd Per Kwh by Building Name
widgets.description: Average electricity rate in USD per kWh grouped by building name
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "building_name" AS label, AVG("rate_usd_per_kwh") AS value FROM "t_energy_consumption" GROUP BY "building_name" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 25

widgets.title: Rate Usd Per Kwh Over Reading Date
widgets.description: Average rate in USD per kWh over time by reading date.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT CAST(date_trunc('month', "reading_date") AS VARCHAR) AS x, AVG("rate_usd_per_kwh") AS value FROM "t_energy_consumption" GROUP BY x ORDER BY x ASC

widgets.title: Rate Usd Per Kwh Distribution by Building Type
widgets.description: Distribution of average electricity rate (USD per kWh) by building type across all energy consumption records.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "building_type" AS label, AVG("rate_usd_per_kwh") AS value FROM "t_energy_consumption" GROUP BY "building_type" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 10

widgets.title: Cost Usd by Building Name Over Reading Date
widgets.description: Trend of total cost in USD over reading dates for each building name.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT CAST(date_trunc('day', "reading_date") AS VARCHAR) AS "x", "building_name" AS "series", CAST(SUM("cost_usd") AS DOUBLE) AS "value" FROM "t_energy_consumption" GROUP BY "x", "series" ORDER BY "x" ASC, "series" ASC

widgets.title: Total Rate Usd Per Kwh
widgets.description: Sum of rate_usd_per_kwh across all energy consumption records
widgets.dataKey: SELECT 'Total Rate Usd Per Kwh' AS label, CAST(SUM("rate_usd_per_kwh") AS DOUBLE) AS value, 0.0 AS delta, 'positive' AS sentiment, 'overall' AS delta_basis FROM "t_energy_consumption" LIMIT 1

widgets.title: Cost Usd Frequency Distribution
widgets.description: Histogram showing the frequency distribution of cost_usd values in the energy consumption data.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT CAST(FLOOR("cost_usd" / 10) * 10 AS VARCHAR) || ' - ' || CAST(FLOOR("cost_usd" / 10) * 10 + 9.99 AS VARCHAR) AS bucket, CAST(COUNT(*) AS DOUBLE) AS count FROM "t_energy_consumption" GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY CAST(SPLIT_PART(bucket, ' - ', 1) AS DOUBLE) ASC

widgets.title: Building Name × Building Type Heatmap
widgets.description: Heatmap showing total kWh consumed by each building name and building type combination.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "building_name" AS row, "building_type" AS col, CAST(SUM("kwh_consumed") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_energy_consumption" GROUP BY "building_name", "building_type" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 400

widgets.title: Rate Usd Per Kwh vs Cost Usd Correlation
widgets.description: Scatter plot showing the correlation between rate in USD per kWh and total cost in USD for energy consumption records.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT CAST("rate_usd_per_kwh" AS DOUBLE) AS x, CAST("cost_usd" AS DOUBLE) AS y FROM "t_energy_consumption" WHERE "rate_usd_per_kwh" IS NOT NULL AND "cost_usd" IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1000

widgets.title: Building Name Composition by Building Type
widgets.description: Stacked bar chart showing total kWh consumed per building name grouped by building type.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "building_name" AS label, "building_type" AS "group", CAST(SUM("kwh_consumed") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_energy_consumption" GROUP BY label, "group" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 25

widgets.title: Cost Usd Volume Over Reading Date
widgets.description: Daily total cost in USD aggregated over reading_date.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT CAST(date_trunc('day', "reading_date") AS VARCHAR) AS "x", CAST(SUM("cost_usd") AS DOUBLE) AS "value" FROM "t_energy_consumption" GROUP BY date_trunc('day', "reading_date") ORDER BY "x" ASC

widgets.title: Building Name Ranked by Cost Usd
widgets.description: Top 25 buildings ranked by total cost in USD from energy consumption.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "building_name" AS label, CAST(SUM("cost_usd") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_energy_consumption" GROUP BY "building_name" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 25

widgets.title: Rate Usd Per Kwh vs Cost Usd by Building Name
widgets.description: Comparison of average rate per kWh and total cost in USD for each building.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "building_name" AS label, AVG("rate_usd_per_kwh") AS value1, SUM("cost_usd") AS value2 FROM "t_energy_consumption" GROUP BY "building_name" ORDER BY (value1 + value2) DESC LIMIT 20

widgets.title: Building Name Composition Over Reading Date
widgets.description: Stacked area chart showing total kWh consumed per building name over reading dates.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT CAST("reading_date" AS VARCHAR) AS x, "building_name" AS series, CAST(SUM("kwh_consumed") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_energy_consumption" GROUP BY x, series ORDER BY x ASC, series ASC

widgets.title: Energy Star Score Proportion by Building Name
widgets.description: Proportion of total Energy Star Score aggregated by building name.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "building_name" AS label, CAST(SUM("energy_star_score") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_energy_consumption" GROUP BY "building_name" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 30
